title: Ever Green Industria e Comercio Ltda ransomware incident

victim.name: Ever Green Industria e Comercio Ltda

extortion.description: www.evergreen.com.br https://www.zoominfo.com/c/ever-green-industria-e-comercio-ltda/426965047 Ever Green Industria e Comercio Ltda is a company that operates in the Animals & Livestock industry. It employs 250to499 people and has 10Mto25M of revenue. The company is headquartered in Sao Bernardo do Campo, Sao Paulo, Brazil. Products are sold in Brazil, Latin America, and Africa, in food retail (wholesalers and retailers), the pharmaceutical channel, the hospital channel, and the institutional channel. Ever Green's products are present in more than 130,000 points of sale. Founded in 1987, Ever Green operates in the Brazilian and international markets
